since_last: 81% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.00%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 81% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.83% · BTC +1.74% · Gold +1.72% · Nasdaq100 +1.73%. 81% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.00%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.00%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.59%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.17%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.17%, HPE +9.84%, SYNA +7.92%, MU +7.40%, LRCX +6.94%. Laggards: AVAV -4.22%, PLTR -3.24%, IBM -2.61%, CRM -2.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.17% at $153.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
